title: penstemon laevigatus subsp. digitalis
intro: Penstemon laevigatus subsp. digitalis, also known as the Rocky Mountain penstemon or beardtongue, is a perennial flowering plant native to the mountainous regions of the western United States. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and act as a natural antiseptic. The health benefits of Penstemon laevigatus subsp. digitalis include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory problems, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, which can be used to treat various ailments, including digestive issues and skin irritations.
